description: Style Note Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wish-list this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Product Details Brown wallet that has a press buttoned closure Five card holders, one transparent id card holder and two insert pockets on one side Six card holders and a zipped compartment on the other side One compartment with a press buttoned closure and branding on the front A zipped compartment on the back Material and Care Blended velvety fabric Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Size 19 cm x 10 cm
